entry:
Sexual Challenges: Dan, Ash & Matt — COMPLETE, and beyond the brief. Matt B was there too, not just other men — all three took turns using you while you stayed locked the whole time. First time the dynamic has extended to a group with Matt B present and participating, not absent or informed after. New Trial: keep building toward the "fluency with other men" milestone — next time, land one full sentence naming what you want, out loud, before or during. Not just noise. Due 19 July.

Kink Exploration: Locked the entire week leading into a group scene with three men — that discipline held under real pressure, not just a quiet week. The group configuration itself (Matt B + two others, simultaneous) is genuinely new territory on the map, distinct from solo exploration with strangers. Worth naming: this is a different kind of kink exploration than Sniffies/Grindr solo-hunting — trust and dynamic were already established via Matt B, which is exactly why the wall didn't show up here the way it did with randoms. New Trial: Sauna — one of the three milestone Trials sitting Planned in the Compendium since 28 June. Time to activate it. Due 26 July.

Vulnerability: The vulnerability named here — being locked in front of others, wondering if they'd find it hot or think it silly — is real and worth sitting with, not solving. That's the actual edge, not a problem to fix. Separately: earlier tonight, before this check-in even happened, you almost gave Dante the tidy version of the night instead of the real one, worried honesty would get pushback. Named the fear, then told the truth anyway. That's Vulnerability Mystery material too — the small voice catching itself and speaking anyway. New Trial: One Real Answer — at the next midweek pulse, give the true version first, no editing for how it'll land. Due 8 July.

Trial Assigned: Sexual Challenges: One full sentence (out loud, with other men, due 19 July) · Kink Exploration: Sauna (due 26 July) · Vulnerability: One Real Answer (due 8 July midweek pulse)
